---
title: "놀이터_플랫폼"
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [title, date, description]
  image-height: 180px
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    sidebar: playground
---

```{=html}
<style>
.stock-header {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a2a4a 0%, #2d4a8c 60%, #3a5aad 100%);
  color: #f5f0e8;
  padding: 1.4rem 2rem;
  border-radius: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.sh-left .sh-title {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin: 0 0 0.25rem;
}
.sh-left .sh-title span { color: #a2b8f0; }
.sh-left .sh-sub {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  opacity: 0.85;
  margin: 0;
}
.sh-right {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-style: italic;
  border-left: 3px solid #a2b8f0;
  padding-left: 0.9rem;
  opacity: 0.88;
  line-height: 1.7;
}
</style>

<div class="stock-header">
  <div class="sh-left">
    <div class="sh-title">🎲 <span>놀이터_플랫폼</span></div>
    <div class="sh-sub">확률 · 통계 · 데이터 기반 인터랙티브 도구 모음</div>
  </div>
  <div class="sh-right">
    베이지안 로또 · 시뮬레이션 · 확률 실험<br>
    통계를 놀이처럼, 데이터로 직접 경험하기
  </div>
</div>
```
